question: While trying to enable the entire drive encryption feature in Windows technician receives the following error message: "A compatible Trusted Platform Module (TPM) Security Device must be present on this computer, but a TPM was not found". Knowing that the system has a TPM chip installed, which of the following steps might help in solving this problem?
canonical_answer: Enabling the TPM security feature in CMOS setup menu

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Certification Questions
appears_in.answer: Enabling the TPM security feature in CMOS setup menu
